POL-397.title: IMPLEMENT: Agent slash-command shims for Polaris skills
POL-397.body:
## Objective

Generate agent-host slash-command shims (Claude Code first) that expand `/polaris-*` intent shortcuts into existing Polaris skill packets, bootloaders, validation gates, and reporting formats without bypassing governance.

## Context

Implements the design from ANALYZE POL-393 (see `smartdocs/raw/pol-393-agent-plugin-slash-command-design.md`). Routes through existing `src/skill-packet/` and `.polaris/skills/ROUTING.md`; adds no parallel runtime. Depends on POL-392 for init/adopt intent verbs.

## Goal

A neutral command manifest plus a Claude Code shim generator that emits `.claude/commands/polaris-*.md` shims mapping each verb to a skill packet or CLI command, with arg validation and re-syncable versioning.

## Scope

* src/agent-plugin/**
* .claude/commands/** (generated output)
* src/cli/adopt-assets.ts

## Acceptance Criteria

* A neutral command manifest maps verbs to skills (SUPPORTED_SKILLS) or CLI commands.
* The Claude Code generator emits per-verb shim files that resolve to a valid packet or command.
* Argument arity/type is validated before any packet runs; bad input yields generated help/error.
* Generated shims carry a version stamp and are re-syncable.

## Validation

* npm run build
* npx vitest run src/agent-plugin

## Ordering

Depends on POL-392 (init/adopt intent verbs launch the Foreman).

## Non-goals

* Do not remove normal CLI commands.
* Do not bypass governance or assume cross-provider plugin parity.

POL-410.title: IMPLEMENT: Slash-command manifest and packet-mapping rules
POL-410.body:
## Objective

Define a neutral slash-command manifest and the rules mapping each verb to a skill packet or a CLI command.

## Context

First child of POL-397 (design: `smartdocs/raw/pol-393-agent-plugin-slash-command-design.md`). Maps verbs to `SUPPORTED_SKILLS` via `src/skill-packet/` and `.polaris/skills/ROUTING.md`.

## Goal

A typed manifest listing `/polaris-*` verbs with their skill or delegated CLI command and arg specs.

## Scope

* src/agent-plugin/commands.ts

## Acceptance Criteria

* Manifest covers run, analyze, init, adopt, reconcile, status.
* Skill-backed verbs resolve to a valid SUPPORTED_SKILLS name; intent verbs delegate to a real CLI command.
* Arg specs (names/arity) are declared per verb.

## Validation

* npm run build
* npx vitest run src/agent-plugin

## Ordering

* None (first in cluster).

## Non-goals

* Do not emit shim files yet (next child).

POL-411.title: IMPLEMENT: Claude Code shim generator
POL-411.body:
## Objective

Generate Claude Code slash-command shim files from the manifest (first target host).

## Context

Second child of POL-397. Emits `.claude/commands/polaris-*.md` shims that read the skill SKILL.md, run `polaris skill packet <name>`, and execute the chain.

## Goal

A generator that writes one shim per manifest verb, each resolving to a valid packet or CLI command.

## Scope

* src/agent-plugin/claude-generator.ts
* .claude/commands/** (generated output)

## Acceptance Criteria

* Each manifest verb produces a `.claude/commands/polaris-<verb>.md` shim.
* Generated shims route through the existing packet+chain path (no parallel runtime).
* Host specifics are isolated in the Claude generator.

## Validation

* npm run build
* npx vitest run src/agent-plugin

## Ordering

* Depends on child 1 (manifest + mapping).

## Non-goals

* Do not implement other hosts; do not remove CLI commands.

POL-412.title: IMPLEMENT: Argument parsing/validation and help/error generation
POL-412.body:
## Objective

Validate slash-command arguments before any packet runs and generate help/error output.

## Context

Third child of POL-397. Uses the manifest arg specs from child 1.

## Goal

Argument validation that rejects bad input with a generated help/error message before invoking a packet.

## Scope

* src/agent-plugin/args.ts
* src/agent-plugin/help.ts

## Acceptance Criteria

* Arity/type mismatches produce a generated error and do not run a packet.
* `--help`-style output is generated per verb from the manifest.
* Valid input passes through to the resolved packet/command.

## Validation

* npm run build
* npx vitest run src/agent-plugin

## Ordering

* Depends on child 2 (shim generator).

## Non-goals

* Do not bypass governance or approval gates.

POL-413.title: IMPLEMENT: Workspace sync and versioning for generated shims
POL-413.body:
## Objective

Stamp generated shims with a version and make them re-syncable as part of workspace asset install.

## Context

Fourth child of POL-397. Hooks into the init/adopt asset install path (`adopt-assets.ts`).

## Goal

A sync step that regenerates shims, stamps a version, and reports drift from SUPPORTED_SKILLS / ROUTING.md.

## Scope

* src/agent-plugin/sync.ts
* src/cli/adopt-assets.ts

## Acceptance Criteria

* Generated shims carry a version stamp.
* `polaris agent-plugin sync` (or asset install) regenerates and updates shims.
* Drift between shims and SUPPORTED_SKILLS/ROUTING.md is detected and reported.

## Validation

* npm run build
* npx vitest run src/agent-plugin

## Ordering

* Depends on child 3 (arg validation + help).

## Non-goals

* Do not assume cross-provider plugin parity.
